headline: Wendy’s New CEO Has a Tough Job. Here’s What Needs to Be Done.
summary: Wendy’s named former Potbelly CEO Robert Wright to lead the burger chain as it battles weak sales, falling traffic, and growing pressure to revive its brand.

headline: Wendy's taps former Potbelly CEO to lead struggling burger chain
summary: Nelson Peltz's Trian Fund Management is seeking funding to take Wendy's private, according to a Financial Times report.

headline: CrowdStrike To Rally Around 7%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
summary: Wall Street analysts changed outlook on top names. Goldman Sachs raised PSX target, BTIG cut DRVN target, Morgan Stanley cut NWL target, B of A raised TK target, Stifel raised PANW target, Mizuho cut HD target, Goldman Sachs raised ENPH target, B of A raised NTAP target.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Hershey, Lowers Price Target to $185
summary: Mizuho  analyst John Baumgartner   maintains Hershey (NYSE:HSY) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $195 to $185.
